# YOUR CODE HERE
import sys

def main():
    M = int(sys.stdin.readline())
    S1 = sys.stdin.readline().strip()
    S2 = sys.stdin.readline().strip()
    S3 = sys.stdin.readline().strip()

    min_time = float('inf')

    # Iterate over all possible characters (digits '0' to '9')
    for ch in set(S1 + S2 + S3):
        # Find positions where the character appears on each reel
        pos1 = [i for i, c in enumerate(S1) if c == ch]
        pos2 = [i for i, c in enumerate(S2) if c == ch]
        pos3 = [i for i, c in enumerate(S3) if c == ch]

        # Check all combinations of positions
        for p1 in pos1:
            for p2 in pos2:
                for p3 in pos3:
                    # Find t such that:
                    # (t mod M) + 1 == p1 + 1 => t mod M == p1
                    # (t mod M) + 1 == p2 + 1 => t mod M == p2
                    # (t mod M) + 1 == p3 + 1 => t mod M == p3
                    # So t mod M must be equal to p1, p2, p3
                    # This is only possible if p1 == p2 == p3
                    if p1 == p2 == p3:
                        t = p1
                        min_time = min(min_time, t)

    if min_time == float('inf'):
        print(-1)
    else:
        print(min_time)

if __name__ == "__main__":
    main()
